args.CodeContent:
"name: Build Android APK

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, master ]
    tags:
      - 'v*'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 17
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        java-version: '17'
        distribution: 'temurin'

    - name: Setup Gradle
      uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

    - name: Generate Gradle Wrapper
      run: gradle wrapper

    - name: Build Debug APK
      run: ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon

    - name: Upload APK Artifact
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: AI-Palmistry-Pro-APK
        path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
"
args.Description: "Add tags trigger and ensure clean workflow execution"

The command `git push origin v2.0` has been launched in the background to push a new Release Tag (`v2.0`).

### 💡 Alternative Ways to Trigger the Build:
1. **GitHub Release Tag**: The `v2.0` tag will trigger a tag-based build event.
2. **Manual Workflow Run (Workflow Dispatch)**:
   - On your GitHub page (**[Actions Tab](https://github.com/divakarpandey07/AI-Palmistry-pro/actions)**), look at the left sidebar under **Management / Workflows**.
   - Click on **"Build Android APK"**.
   - On the right side, click the **Run workflow** dropdown button.
   - Select branch **`main`** and click the green **Run workflow** button. This will force start a build immediately.

---

### 🛠️ How to Start the APK Build manually on GitHub:

Since automatic push triggers may be paused or rate-limited on your repository settings, you can manually trigger the build in 3 quick clicks from the page shown in your screenshot:

1. On your **Actions** page (`https://github.com/divakarpandey07/AI-Palmistry-pro/actions`), look at the left sidebar under **Workflows**.
2. Click on **Build Android APK**.
3. A grey bar will appear on the right side with a **"Run workflow"** button. Click **Run workflow**, ensure branch **`main`** is selected, and click the green **Run workflow** button.

The new build will start immediately, generating your updated **`AI-Palmistry-Pro-APK`** with all 5 classical interactive modules & Home page launcher!

Here are the **2 easiest ways** to run the build directly:

---

### Option 1: Re-run Existing Workflow (Easiest)
1. On your Actions page, click on the top completed run: **`Implement Dual Hand Scan... (#21)`**.
2. At the top right of that page, click the **Re-run jobs** (or **Re-run all jobs**) button.
3. It will re-build the APK using your latest pushed code!

---

### Option 2: View Workflow File Directly
1. Go to this link in your browser:
   **[android_build.yml File Link](https://github.com/divakarpandey07/AI-Palmistry-pro/blob/main/.github/workflows/android_build.yml)**
2. At the top right of the file viewer, you will see a **"Run workflow"** button.
3. Click **Run workflow** -> Click the green **Run workflow** button to start the build!
